name: Eggnog Mold
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the contents of two envelopes of gelatin into 1/2 cup of cold water and let sit until softened.
2. Place over low heat and stir until the gelatin is completely dissolved.
3. Gradually add the dissolved gelatin mixture to the chilled eggnog, then stir in the ground almonds.
4. Pour the mixture into an oiled 5-cup mold.
5. Refrigerate for about 3-4 hours, or until set.
6. Unmold and garnish with sliced dried mandarin oranges and Coolwhip before serving.
(Note: Do not leave heat on; turn off when ready.)
